name: Bremer Community Center
description: Bremer Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Aurora, NE. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available.

name: Streeters Park Tennis/Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Streeters Park Tennis/Pickleball Courts in Aurora, NE! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
